sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66511" key="meso/tomos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσό-τομος</orth>-, poet. <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσσ-</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n66511.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cut through the middle, split</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κάλαμοι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.63</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Damoch.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
